Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class AutoTacticChecker

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.AutoTacticChecker
public class AutoTacticChecker extends Object
Allows to check that auto tactics seem to work (see bug #779).

  • Method Details

    • checkAutoTactics

      public static org.eclipse.core.runtime.IStatus checkAutoTactics(boolean ignoreCache, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Checks all auto tactics provided by other plugins.
      Parameters:
      ignoreCache - if true, ignores the cache and runs all tactics again
      monitor - progress monitor, may be null
